svg.title: From Pain to Venture – Part 02 Reference Images
svg.desc: Reference images for Part 02: CPS Validation and Four D Loop, plus key frameworks including Design Thinking, Double Diamond, and Value Proposition Canvas.
svg.text: From Pain to Venture – Part 02 Reference Images
1. CPS Validation and Four D Loop
Discover → Define → Develop → Deliver. Iteration sharpens judgement each round.
CPS Fit must be re-confirmed after each iteration.
2. Key frameworks referenced
• Design Thinking – delayed certainty, not brainstorming
• Double Diamond – enter problem space before solution space
• Four D Process – Discover, Define, Develop, Deliver (field version)
• Value Proposition Canvas – pull imagined value back to user's world
• Empathy Map / Journey Map / Stakeholder Map
• 5 Whys & Assumption Map – stop teams believing themselves too quickly
• C-P-S Fit – not a slogan, a continuously re-confirmed alignment
• MVP belongs after hypotheses, not after excitement
3. Iteration vs Rework
Iteration is not repeating the same work. It is sharper judgement each round —
each loop should reduce uncertainty, not just redo what did not work.
4. Key principle
Tools do not make the judgement for you. They make it harder to avoid judgement.
Source: Strategyzer Value Proposition Canvas
https://www.strategyzer.com/library/the-value-proposition-canvas
